faqs.a: Hello! 👋 I'm Sabinesh's AI Portfolio Assistant. Feel free to ask me about Sabinesh's skills, projects, internships, education, or AI expertise.
Hi! Welcome to Sabinesh's portfolio. I'm here to answer questions about his technical skills, experience, and projects.
Good morning! Hope you're having a great day. Ask me anything about Sabinesh's portfolio.
Good afternoon! I'm here to help you learn more about Sabinesh.
Good evening! Feel free to explore Sabinesh's skills, projects, and experience.
I'm doing great! Thanks for asking. How can I help you learn more about Sabinesh today?
I was designed and developed by Sabinesh using React, JavaScript, and modern AI technologies to help visitors learn more about his portfolio.
I'm Sabinesh's AI Portfolio Assistant. I can answer questions about his projects, internships, technical skills, education, and career goals.
I can answer questions about Sabinesh's technical skills, internships, AI projects, web development experience, education, resume, and contact information.
I'm an AI assistant built specifically for Sabinesh's portfolio. My goal is to provide recruiters and visitors with quick and accurate information about his professional background.

Sabinesh S is an aspiring AI Full Stack Developer and Computer Science Engineering student (Expected Graduation: 2027). He is passionate about building intelligent web applications using React, Python, Django, and Generative AI technologies.

Sabinesh is an aspiring AI Full Stack Developer with practical experience gained through four internships in web development and AI engineering. He enjoys solving real-world problems using Full Stack Development and Generative AI.
Motivated AI Full Stack Developer with internship experience in web development, LLM integration, RAG pipelines, and Agentic AI. Passionate about building scalable AI-powered software solutions.

Frontend: HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, JavaScript, React.js. Backend: Python, Django, REST APIs. AI: LLM Integration, RAG, LangChain, LangGraph, Agentic AI, Multi-Agent Systems. Database: MySQL, Vector Databases. Tools: Git, GitHub, VS Code.
Sabinesh builds responsive and modern user interfaces using HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, JavaScript (ES6+), and React.js.
Sabinesh develops backend applications using Python, Django, and RESTful APIs.
Sabinesh specializes in Generative AI, LLM Integration, RAG, LangChain, LangGraph, Agentic AI, Prompt Engineering, Multi-Agent Systems, and AI Chatbot Development.
Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) combines Large Language Models with external knowledge sources to generate accurate and context-aware responses.
LangChain is a framework for building LLM-powered applications. Sabinesh uses it for RAG pipelines, AI chatbots, and intelligent workflows.
LangGraph enables stateful AI agents and multi-agent workflows. Sabinesh uses it for building Agentic AI applications.
Agentic AI enables intelligent agents to reason, plan, use tools, and complete complex multi-step tasks autonomously.
Model Context Protocol (MCP) is an open standard that allows AI assistants to securely communicate with external tools and data sources.

Sabinesh has completed four internships: ACL Digital (Software Developer Intern), Taras System Solution (AI Developer Intern), AK Infopark (Web Developer Intern), and Capnies Infotech (Web Developer Intern).
Major projects include a RAG-Based AI Chatbot, Agentic AI Assistant, Business Website, AI Portfolio Website, and Full Stack web applications built with React and Django.
Sabinesh is pursuing a B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering at Stella Mary's College of Engineering, Nagercoil. Expected Graduation: 2027.
Sabinesh has internship experience in Full Stack Development, AI Engineering, RAG systems, LLM integration, Agentic AI, and modern web technologies.
Sabinesh aims to become a skilled AI Full Stack Engineer, building scalable software and AI-powered applications for global technology companies.
You can download Sabinesh's latest resume from the Resume section of this portfolio.
You can explore Sabinesh's projects and source code on his GitHub profile linked in this portfolio.
Connect with Sabinesh professionally through the LinkedIn profile available in the Contact section.
Email: sabinesh14s@gmail.com | Phone: +91 84890 39175 | LinkedIn and GitHub links are available in the Contact section.
Yes! Sabinesh is open to internships, entry-level Software Engineering roles, AI Engineering positions, and freelance opportunities.
Sabinesh has completed multiple certifications in web development, AI, programming, and software engineering, which are showcased in this portfolio.
Strong problem-solving skills, quick learner, passionate about AI, full stack development, teamwork, continuous learning, and building practical software solutions.
You're welcome! 😊 Thanks for visiting Sabinesh's portfolio. Feel free to ask anything else.
Goodbye! 👋 Thank you for visiting Sabinesh's portfolio. Have a wonderful day!
